queue_item.action: Integrate evidence envelope, claim lifecycle, provenance, builder trust, and artifact-byte binding into one fail-closed downstream acceptance gate.

progress.finding: Individually valid evidence controls do not create a valid acceptance decision unless their outputs are composed and all gates must pass for the exact artifact bytes and aligned claim state.
progress.verification: Five deterministic adversarial cases are committed; source commits and artifact paths were recorded. Runtime or CI passage was not observed in this run.

queue_item.handoff: Cloudflare Research should place this gate immediately before accepting deployment or medicine-facing evidence packets. Vercel Studio should apply it before promoting runtime evidence to deployment-verified. Continuity Mining should use it when admitting effective queue evidence into durable memory.

state_update_policy: append_only; operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json and other teams' records were not overwritten
